hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/opt/valli'; then REPO=/opt/valli; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/opt/openclaw'; then REPO=/opt/openclaw; else exit 0; fi; FNAME=$(basename "$FILE"); cd "$REPO" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "snapshot: before editing $FNAME" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/opt/valli'; then REPO=/opt/valli; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/opt/openclaw'; then REPO=/opt/openclaw; else exit 0; fi; FNAME=$(basename "$FILE"); cd "$REPO" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "edit: $FNAME" 2>/dev/null || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "Для отката выполните: git revert HEAD"}'
